creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin 

This is an error thrown by Mk/Uses/samba.mk not an error in the devel/kio-extras port.

Apparently, only SAMBA_DEFAULT=4.10 is supported by the ports tree at the moment.  See [1]


mfg Tobias

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/Mk/Uses/samba.mk?revision=520186&view=markup#l29
